mapper.sql: id, st_avatar_url, st_world_names_json, owner_user_id, name, description, tagline, bio, persona, scenario, first_message, alternate_greetings_json AS alternate_greetings, mes_example, system_prompt, post_history_instructions, avatar_url, cover_url, private_card, review_status, review_reason, reviewed_at, reviewed_by, deleted_at, tags_json, occupation_label, gameplay_type, vip_only, unlocked_default, creator_name, creator_handle, token_display, chat_modes_json, st_extra_json, sort_order, like_count, dislike_count, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM app_character WHERE owner_user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY name ASC, id DESC
ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC
LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM app_character WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_character ( st_avatar_url, st_world_names_json, name, description, owner_user_id, tagline, bio, persona, scenario, first_message, alternate_greetings_json, mes_example, system_prompt, post_history_instructions, avatar_url, cover_url, private_card, review_status, review_reason, reviewed_at, reviewed_by, tags_json, occupation_label, gameplay_type, vip_only, unlocked_default, creator_name, creator_handle, token_display, chat_modes_json, st_extra_json, sort_order, like_count, dislike_count ) VALUES ( #{stAvatarUrl}, #{stWorldNamesJson}, #{name}, #{description}, #{ownerUserId}, #{tagline}, #{bio}, #{persona}, #{scenario}, #{firstMessage}, #{alternateGreetings, typeHandler=com.example.sillyspringboot.compat.h5.mybatis.JsonStringListTypeHandler}, #{mesExample}, #{systemPrompt}, #{postHistoryInstructions}, #{avatarUrl}, #{coverUrl}, #{privateCard}, #{reviewStatus}, #{reviewReason}, #{reviewedAt}, #{reviewedBy}, #{tagsJson}, #{occupationLabel}, #{gameplayType}, #{vipOnly}, #{unlockedDefault}, #{creatorName}, #{creatorHandle}, #{tokenDisplay}, #{chatModesJson}, #{stExtraJson}, #{sortOrder}, #{likeCount}, #{dislikeCount} )
mapper.update: UPDATE app_character SET st_world_names_json = #{stWorldNamesJson}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, tagline = #{tagline}, bio = #{bio}, persona = #{persona}, scenario = #{scenario}, first_message = #{firstMessage}, alternate_greetings_json = #{alternateGreetings, typeHandler=com.example.sillyspringboot.compat.h5.mybatis.JsonStringListTypeHandler}, mes_example = #{mesExample}, system_prompt = #{systemPrompt}, post_history_instructions = #{postHistoryInstructions}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, private_card = #{privateCard}, review_status = #{reviewStatus}, review_reason = #{reviewReason}, reviewed_at = #{reviewedAt}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, tags_json = #{tagsJson}, occupation_label = #{occupationLabel}, gameplay_type = #{gameplayType}, vip_only = #{vipOnly}, unlocked_default = #{unlockedDefault}, creator_name = #{creatorName}, creator_handle = #{creatorHandle}, token_display = #{tokenDisplay}, chat_modes_json = #{chatModesJson}, st_extra_json = #{stExtraJson}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, like_count = #{likeCount}, dislike_count = #{dislikeCount}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId}

UPDATE app_character SET deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE st_avatar_url = #{stAvatarUrl} AND private_card = 0 AND owner_user_id IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL AND (avatar_url IS NULL OR avatar_url = '') AND (cover_url IS NULL OR cover_url = '') AND (creator_name IS NULL OR creator_name = '') AND (creator_handle IS NULL OR creator_handle = '') AND (tags_json IS NULL OR tags_json = '' OR tags_json = '[]')

UPDATE app_character SET st_avatar_url = CONCAT('__deleted_private__/', id, '/', LEFT(st_avatar_url, 220)), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND owner_user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NOT NULL AND st_avatar_url IS NOT NULL AND st_avatar_url != '' AND st_avatar_url NOT LIKE '__deleted_private__/%'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_character WHERE owner_user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
